title: eriosema griseum
intro: Eriosema griseum, also known as White Pea Tree, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema. Eriosema griseum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
